query:
-- Fix product cost map: SmileTel Executive User License (ID 25)
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map
SET wholesaleCost = 9.00,
    defaultRetailPrice = 15.00,
    rrp = 15.00,
    notes = 'Migration product: Buy $9.00, Sell $15.00 (Access4 migration)'
WHERE id = 25;

-- Fix product cost map: MC - SmileTel Executive User License (ID 30)
UPDATE supplier_product_cost_map
SET wholesaleCost = 9.00,
    defaultRetailPrice = 15.00,
    rrp = 15.00,
    notes = 'Migration product: Buy $9.00, Sell $15.00 (Access4 migration) - MC variant'
WHERE id = 30;

-- Fix all services with SmileTel Executive User License planName to $9.00 per unit
-- (These are per-seat services, each should cost $9.00)
UPDATE services
SET monthlyCost = 9.00,
    costSource = 'product_map'
WHERE planName IN ('SmileTel Executive User License', 'MC - SmileTel Executive User License');

-- Verify the changes
SELECT planName, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as totalCost, MIN(monthlyCost) as minCost, MAX(monthlyCost) as maxCost
FROM services
WHERE planName LIKE '%Executive%'
GROUP BY planName;
